title: selago rotundifolia
intro: Selago rotundifolia, also known as round-leaved selaginella, is a small, evergreen perennial plant native to South Africa, belonging to the Selaginellaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and relieving congestion, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Selago rotundifolia can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and alleviate various health issues.
